reasoning_model_1: Model 1 strictly follows the command to speak in a whisper ('耳语'). The volume is appropriately low and intimate, matching the semantic content '我悄悄告诉你' (I quietly tell you). The content is accurate to the script.
reasoning_model_2: Model 2 fails to follow the paralinguistic instruction. model_comparison: Model 1 followed the specific instruction to use a 'whisper' style (controlling the volume and phonation mode), whereas Model 2 spoke in a normal, full voice. Model 1 is the only one that satisfied the core constraint.
